cells.text: Accrual Statement of Operations by Category
Total Expenses Before Non-Cash Liability Adjs.
Total Expenses After Non-Cash Liability Adjs.
Notes: Totals may not add due to rounding

Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the YTD results.

A toll increase was implemented on 4/11/2021 and is reflected in actual results. The budget is captured below the line in MTA Consolidated financial results and will be incorporated in the baseline in the July Financial Plan.
